articles.title: SpatialClaw: Rethinking Action Interface for Agentic Spatial Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Spatial reasoning, the ability to determine where objects are, how they relate, and how they move in 3D, remains a fundamental challenge for vision-language models (VLMs). Tool-augmented agents attempt to address this by augmenting VLMs with specialist perception modules, yet their effectiveness is bounded by the action interface through which those tools are invoked. In this work, we study how th
articles.summary: 针对视觉语言模型在3D空间推理中的挑战，研究工具增强智能体的动作接口设计，提出SpatialClaw，通过重新定义动作接口（如点、夹爪操作）提升空间推理能力，解决VLM在确定物体位置、关系和运动方面的局限。

articles.title: WEAVER, Better, Faster, Longer: An Effective World Model for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: The potential impacts of world models (WMs, i.e., learned simulators) on robotics are far-reaching -- policy evaluation, policy improvement, and test-time planning -- all with limited real-world interaction. To unlock these downstream capabilities, a WM needs to jointly satisfy three desiderata: (i) fidelity (i.e., producing simulated trajectories that correlate with reality), (ii) consistency (i.
articles.summary: 提出WEAVER世界模型，同时满足保真度、一致性和长期性三项需求，用于机器人操作中的策略评估、改进和测试时规划，在减少真实世界交互的同时保持模拟轨迹与实际情况高度相关。

articles.title: MiniMax Sparse Attention
articles.excerpt: Ultra-long-context capability is becoming indispensable for frontier LLMs: agentic workflows, repository-scale code reasoning, and persistent memory all require the model to jointly attend over hundreds of thousands to millions of tokens, yet the quadratic cost of softmax attention makes this untenable at deployment scale. We introduce MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), a blockwise sparse attention b
articles.summary: 针对超长上下文LLM中softmax注意力的二次复杂度，提出MiniMax稀疏注意力（MSA），采用块稀疏注意力机制，使模型高效处理数十万至百万级token，适用于agent工作流、代码推理和持久记忆场景。

articles.title: MoVerse: Real-Time Video World Modeling with Panoramic Gaussian Scaffold
articles.excerpt: We present MoVerse, a real-time video world model that creates an interactively navigable scene from a single narrow-field-of-view image. This setting is challenging because the input observes only a small fraction of the environment, while interactive roaming requires a complete surrounding world, persistent geometry, controllable camera motion, and temporally coherent high-fidelity observations.
articles.summary: 提出MoVerse，从单张窄视场图像实时创建可交互全景场景，利用全景高斯骨架实现持久几何、可控相机运动和时域一致的高保真观测，支持交互式漫游，突破了输入仅观察小部分环境的限制。

articles.title: Demystifying Hidden-State Recurrence: Switchable Latent Reasoning with On-Policy Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Latent chain-of-thought compresses reasoning by replacing visible reasoning traces with continuous hidden-state recurrence, but existing formulations are difficult to optimize with standard on-policy reinforcement learning (RL) and hard to interpret causally. Our key insight is that a single pair of explicit boundary tokens can address both issues at once: discrete entry and exit anchors make the
articles.summary: 揭示潜在链式推理中隐藏状态循环的优化和因果解释问题，提出通过一对显式边界token（入口和出口锚点）实现可切换潜在推理，并用on-policy强化学习优化，使模型在压缩推理过程的同时保持可解释性。

articles.title: APPO: Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in agentic Reinforcement Learning (RL) have substantially improved the multi-turn tool-use capabilities of large language model agents. However, most existing methods assign credit over coarse heuristic units, such as tool-call boundaries or fixed workflows, making it difficult to identify which intermediate decisions influence downstream outcomes. In this work, we study agentic RL
articles.summary: 改进agentic RL中粗粒度信用分配问题，提出代理过程策略优化（APPO），在工具调用层面进行细粒度信用分配，识别哪些中间决策影响下游结果，提升多轮工具使用中LLM代理的任务完成能力。
